explain.stringValue: 跑题 = 0 分; 全文必有 1 句扣 theme 关键词

cloze|Ali and I used to live in the same village. ___ through the village was a river.|C16

id.stringValue: cloze|Ali and I used to live in the same village. ___ through the village was a river.|C16:1779460356410_0

explain.stringValue: Flowing through = 流经 (现在分词作定语); Across 是介词不能单独作主语. 真考 16 题, 你写 Across 错.

q.stringValue: Ali and I used to live in the same village. ___ through the village was a river.
Ali's house was on one side of the river and mine was on the ___ side.

id.stringValue: cloze|Ali's house was on one side of the river and mine was on the ___ side.|C17:1779460356410_1

explain.stringValue: the other side = 另一边 (两个中的另一个, 确指); another 不能跟 the. 真考 17 题, 你写 another 错.

_fp.stringValue: cloze|Ali's house was on one side of the river and mine was on the ___ side.|C17

id.stringValue: cloze|Across the river was a sturdy bridge ___ enough for two lorries to pass through.|C18:1779460356410_2

explain.stringValue: wide + enough = 足够宽 (形容词描述桥的宽度可让车通过); which 是关系代词不能用. 真考 18 题, 你写 which 错.

q.stringValue: Across the river was a sturdy bridge ___ enough for two lorries to pass through.

_fp.stringValue: cloze|Across the river was a sturdy bridge ___ enough for two lorries to pass through.|C18

explain.stringValue: watched = 持续看 (ripples form 是过程); saw 是看见一瞬. 真考 20 题, 你写 saw 错.

id.stringValue: cloze|As I ___ the ripples form on the water, Ali crept up from behind.|C20:1779460356410_3

q.stringValue: As I ___ the ripples form on the water, Ali crept up from behind.

_fp.stringValue: cloze|As I ___ the ripples form on the water, Ali crept up from behind.|C20

explain.stringValue: so + adj + that = 如此...以致 (结果状语); too + adj + to + 动 (不能跟 that). 真考 23 题, 你写 too 错.

id.stringValue: cloze|The current was ___ strong that I struggled to swim back to the bank.|C23:1779460356410_4

q.stringValue: The current was ___ strong that I struggled to swim back to the bank.

_fp.stringValue: cloze|The current was ___ strong that I struggled to swim back to the bank.|C23

q.stringValue: ___ I saw him, I would tell myself that I would have my revenge one day.

id.stringValue: cloze|___ I saw him, I would tell myself that I would have my revenge one day.|C25:1779460356410_5

explain.stringValue: Whenever = 每当 (习惯性, 每次都这样); When = 一次. 上下文是 "每次见到他", 用 Whenever. 真考 25 题, 你写 When 错.

_fp.stringValue: cloze|___ I saw him, I would tell myself that I would have my revenge one day.|C25

id.stringValue: cloze|No one knew it but whenever I saw him, I would tell ___ that I would have my revenge.|C26:1779460356410_6

explain.stringValue: 反身代词: I 告诉 自己 → myself (主语和宾语同一人). 真考 26 题, 你写 him 错.

q.stringValue: No one knew it but whenever I saw him, I would tell ___ that I would have my revenge.

_fp.stringValue: cloze|No one knew it but whenever I saw him, I would tell ___ that I would have my revenge.|C26

q.stringValue: Ali could not swim and was ___ before my eyes.

explain.stringValue: drowning = 正在溺水 (was + V-ing 过去进行); sanked 不是英文词. 真考 29 题, 你写 Sanked 错.

id.stringValue: cloze|Ali could not swim and was ___ before my eyes.|C29:1779460356410_7

_fp.stringValue: cloze|Ali could not swim and was ___ before my eyes.|C29
cloze|Abdul plunged into the river and pulled Ali to ___.|C30

id.stringValue: cloze|Abdul plunged into the river and pulled Ali to ___.|C30:1779460356410_8

explain.stringValue: pull/bring sb to safety = 救出脱险 (固定搭配, safety 抽象名词); pull to ground 不对. 真考 30 题, 你写 ground 错.

q.stringValue: Abdul plunged into the river and pulled Ali to ___.

explain.stringValue: twins (拼写正确, 你写 "twee" 是 typo); were 主谓一致看 nor 后名词 (twins 复数 → were); neither + nor 配对 (不是 or). 真考 31 题, 你写 twee 拼错.

id.stringValue: sst|Mrs Tan was not at the birthday party last night. The twins were not there too.|D31-spelling:1779460356410_9

q.stringValue: Mrs Tan was not at the birthday party last night. The twins were not there too.

values.stringValue: Neither Mrs Tan nor the twins were at the birthday party last night.
Neither Mrs Tan nor the twee twins were at the birthday party last night.
Neither Mrs Tan nor the twins was at the birthday party last night.
Neither Mrs Tan or the twins were at the birthday party last night.

_fp.stringValue: sst|Mrs Tan was not at the birthday party last night. The twins were not there too.|D31-spelling

explain.stringValue: 指令性 indirect speech: instructed + sb + to + 动. station 不能丢; before + V-ing (changing 不是 change). 真考 33 题, 你漏了 station 和 connector.

id.stringValue: sst|"Take the train to Lavender station before changing to the bus," Sam instructed his sister.|D33-connector:1779460356410_10

q.stringValue: "Take the train to Lavender station before changing to the bus," Sam instructed his sister.

rule.stringValue: Rewrite in indirect speech starting with "Sam instructed".

values.stringValue: Sam instructed his sister to take the train to Lavender station before changing to the bus.
Sam instructed his sister to take the train to Lavender before $ changing to the bus.
Sam instructed his sister that to take the train to Lavender station before changing to the bus.
Sam instructed his sister to take the train to Lavender station before change to the bus.

_fp.stringValue: sst|"Take the train to Lavender station before changing to the bus," Sam instructed his sister.|D33-connector

explain.stringValue: whose = 所有格关系代词 (= his wallet). 非限定从句两边要逗号 (John, whose..., is). 真考 34 题, 你写错: 把 "The teacher" 放前面 + 末尾再加 "was John" 是冗余, 完全搞反了句子结构. 这是 10 分大题!

id.stringValue: sst|John's wallet was stolen. John is a teacher.|D34-whose:1779460356410_11

q.stringValue: John's wallet was stolen. John is a teacher.

values.stringValue: John, whose wallet was stolen, is a teacher.
The teacher John, whose wallet has been stolen was John.
John whose wallet was stolen is a teacher.
John, who his wallet was stolen, is a teacher.

_fp.stringValue: sst|John's wallet was stolen. John is a teacher.|D34-whose

id.stringValue: sst|The farmer saw a snake slithering behind the bushes. He yelled out loudly.|D35-spelling:1779460356410_12

explain.stringValue: bushes (复数, 不是 bushed); slithering (现在分词修饰 snake); After + V-ing (动名词). 真考 35 题, 你把 bushes 拼成 bushed 错.

q.stringValue: The farmer saw a snake slithering behind the bushes. He yelled out loudly.

_fp.stringValue: sst|The farmer saw a snake slithering behind the bushes. He yelled out loudly.|D35-spelling

values.stringValue: After seeing a snake slithering behind the bushes, the farmer yelled out loudly.
After seeing a snake slithering behind the bushed, the farmer yelled out loudly.
After seeing a snake slither behind the bushes, the farmer yelled out loudly.
After see a snake slithering behind the bushes, the farmer yelled out loudly.

q.stringValue: The eyebrow is an important facial feature. ___ completing our look, our eyebrows have three other major functions.

explain.stringValue: Besides + V-ing = 除了 (introducing additional functions); B11 of original = Besides 字母 (E). 真考 7 题字母填错.

id.stringValue: cloze|The eyebrow is an important facial feature. ___ completing our look, our eyebrows have three other major functions.|B7:1779460356410_13

_fp.stringValue: cloze|The eyebrow is an important facial feature. ___ completing our look, our eyebrows have three other major functions.|B7
cloze|When a person raises an eyebrow, it means he is unsure ___ something.|B11

q.stringValue: When a person raises an eyebrow, it means he is unsure ___ something.

id.stringValue: cloze|When a person raises an eyebrow, it means he is unsure ___ something.|B11:1779460356410_14

explain.stringValue: unsure about + sth = 不确定 (固定搭配); unsure with 错. 真考 11 题选错字母.

q.stringValue: ___ in cartoons, a simple line above eyes is enough to portray emotions.

explain.stringValue: 这里 Why = 这就是为什么 (引出原因, 前句解释了 eyebrow 重要性); How 不通顺. 真考 12 题选错.

id.stringValue: cloze|___ in cartoons, a simple line above eyes is enough to portray emotions.|B12:1779460356410_15

cloze|People are more likely to identify other people ___ their eyebrows as compared to other facial features.|B15

q.stringValue: People are more likely to identify other people ___ their eyebrows as compared to other facial features.

id.stringValue: cloze|People are more likely to identify other people ___ their eyebrows as compared to other facial features.|B15:1779460356410_16

explain.stringValue: identify sb with sth = 通过某物认出某人 (固定); identify by 也偶尔用但 with 更准. 真考 15 题选错.
